note: Single canonical Tamazia sector taxonomy. 20 sectors x 20 ICPs = 400 verbatim client types from the 20x20 PDF ("Tamazia Client Taxonomy — 20 Sectors x 20 ICPs"). priority_rank 1..20; is_priority=true for ranks 1-10 (the founder-proven + obvious high-regulation/high-ticket verticals per the PDF TL;DR + Recommendations). subsectors[].name are verbatim ICP names; pricing_tier is the PDF Tier (Foundation/Authority/Enterprise). keywords[] are generous on purpose (the classifier matches on these). sic_codes[] are UK SIC 2007 where reasonably inferable, else [].
